element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Direct combat against named opponents including Stalin Fortimesky (Round 6)

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive escalation through campaign rounds and versus matches; tension builds through successive opponent encounters

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden stage select accessible via Game Genie codes (XTKLLIAV/XTOUYIAV/XTEUZIAV) or button combinations

difficulty_curve.early_game: Initial campaign missions with basic enemy encounters
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive difficulty escalation through campaign rounds and advancing versus opponents
difficulty_curve.late_game: Round 6+ versus mode featuring named opponents (e.g., Stalin Fortimesky); endgame content unlocked at 50,000+ points
notable_spikes: Transition from campaign to 1P VS Game mode
Round 6 opponent encounter in versus mode

notable_level_patterns.description: Sequential mission structure with escalating difficulty; supports both single-player campaign and versus match modes
One-on-one dogfight matches against named opponents; progresses through numbered rounds with increasing difficulty
Congratulations screen appears on game over after achieving 50,000+ points; hidden ending accessible via Game Genie code (ZLELETLG) in European version
